//: Copy to backends.json (gitignored — it may hold API keys) and edit.
//llm: backend 'ollama' (default: local Ollama) or 'openai' — any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. HF serverless router: base_url https://router.huggingface.co/v1 with an hf_ token. Dedicated HF Inference Endpoint (TGI): base_url https://<name>.endpoints.huggingface.cloud/v1. Remote Ollama: keep backend 'ollama' and change base_url.
//stt: backend 'local' (bundled Whisper; recommended — hosted Whisper endpoints usually auto-detect language and ignore the en/es button) or 'remote' (POST WAV -> {"text": ...}, e.g. an HF automatic-speech-recognition endpoint).
